data.acceptance:
1. Managed skill text distinguishes normal agent claim leases from MCP session leases using the exact states `lease_active`, `lease_ready`, and `lease_terminated` where relevant.
2. `knots`, `knots-e2e`, `knots-create`, and `knots-plan-orchestrator` guidance tells CLI agents to use a fresh normal claim lease after `kno next` or rollback without falsely saying MCP session leases are destroyed.
3. A regression test fails if the managed skills collapse the lifecycle into an unconditional “leases are destroyed” rule or reintroduce reuse of a normal claim lease across e2e claims.
4. Verification commands `cargo test managed_skills` and `make sanity` pass.
